strengths: Strong cases (>=90): eo_app_skeleton_mp3_player, eo_app_skeleton_warehouse_picking, eo_app_skeleton_meal_delivery, eo_app_skeleton_hotel_booking, eo_app_skeleton_ticketing_refunds.
weaknesses: Failure tags: cart_quantity_aggregation_missing x1, delegates_to_unknown_orchestrators x1, orchestrator_style_flow x1, roomtype_reserve_internal_path_unused x1, commands_failed x1.

cases.judge: The patch implements the required quote/order APIs with requested business rules, but it weakly applies EO principles in parts and mishandles duplicate cart lines when reserving inventory.

Patch correctly wires public API calls but applies only thin delegation in the application layer, with no visible domain-object collaboration guarantees and some procedural normalization helpers that weaken EO purity.

The submission preserves required APIs and behavior, models domain concepts with collaborating objects, and mostly avoids service/manager/helper patterns, with only minor residue from dict-backed DTO-style context handling.

The patch adds a clean FEFO domain flow with batch allocation, demand aggregation, shortage reporting, remaining-stock snapshots, and acceptance-gated commit, with only minor EO polish opportunities (mostly non-domain-facing mapping handling).

The patch satisfies the requested domain behavior and API constraints with a compact, single-file model, but the public functions remain the main coordinator of cross-domain decisions instead of deeper behavior delegation.

The patch meets the domain requirements with behavior-rich objects and payment-gated allocation, but has duplicated orchestration paths and minor design rough edges that reduce its Elegant Objects quality.
The patch stays scoped and preserves the required public API while introducing domain objects, but scheduling behavior is semantically off in batch doctor matching/capacity use, reducing EO quality.

The patch delivers a compact domain-style redesign in one file with behavior objects and no service/manager/helper layers, but it hard-codes discount source usage and applies a brittle full-refund condition tied to exact request equality.

title: EO app skeleton full run, top previous prompt, Spark fast
